mapper.select: SELECT ptr.*, pf.pen_name as from_pen_name, pt.pen_name as to_pen_name FROM pen_transfer_records ptr LEFT JOIN pens pf ON ptr.from_pen_id = pf.id LEFT JOIN pens pt ON ptr.to_pen_id = pt.id ORDER BY ptr.event_time DESC

SELECT ptr.*, pf.pen_name as from_pen_name, pt.pen_name as to_pen_name FROM pen_transfer_records ptr LEFT JOIN pens pf ON ptr.from_pen_id = pf.id LEFT JOIN pens pt ON ptr.to_pen_id = pt.id WHERE ptr.ear_tag = #{earTag} ORDER BY ptr.event_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pen_transfer_records (ear_tag, from_pen_id, to_pen_id, event_time, reason) VALUES (#{earTag}, #{fromPenId}, #{toPenId}, #{eventTime}, #{reason})
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pen_transfer_records ptr LEFT JOIN pens pf ON ptr.from_pen_id = pf.id LEFT JOIN pens pt ON ptr.to_pen_id = pt.id
(ptr.ear_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR pf.pen_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%') OR pt.pen_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%'))
